name: Iced Coffee Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve coffee and brown sugar in boiling water.
2. Add cinnamon and mixed spice.
3. Add cold water and stir well.
4. Add milk, vanilla, and whipping cream. Whisk lightly until evenly combined.
5. Pour the mixture into glasses.
6. Add 2 ice cubes to each glass.
7. Half-fill each glass with the coffee mixture.
8. Add a scoop of ice cream to each glass.
9. Top up with the remaining coffee mixture.
10. Sprinkle with unsweetened cocoa powder.
11. Garnish with cinnamon sticks, lime slices, and grated chocolate if desired.
12. Serve immediately with long-handled spoons.
Variation: For a sweeter version, increase brown sugar to taste. If desired, top each glass with a little whipped cream.
